review_title: An ESSENTIAL Tool for Online Visibility
description: Overall, my experience with Webmaster has been overwhelmingly positive with a few minor pitfalls and I would absolutely recommend it to all.
author: Husam R.
pros: Perhaps the absolute best feature of Webmaster is its readily available and easily understandable SEO reports, which can be quite complicated on other less user-friendly platforms.
cons: The feature I least admire about the product is rather slow indexing, which causes delays in website speed and agility as well as issues pertaining to the prolonged nature of waiting out data reports.

review_title: Indexing & Optimisation With Microsoft Bing Webmaster Tools
author: Mike P.
pros: Robust suite of analysis and optimisation tools for Microsoft's search engine. Straightforward, easy to understand interface. Perform keyword research, full site scans, check backlinks, submit full site maps or individual URLs for indexing. Plenty of analysis tools, insights & support, and regular performance reports available by email.
cons: No significant negatives to report - straightforward set of tools & easy to use.

description: We try use it as often as we can and their are some great insights here. However, the reality is Bing only contributes a very small percentage of traffic to our website.
author: ryan B.
pros: Indexnow is a great feature, whilst still maintaining the traditional url inspection tool. The built in robots.txt checker is a nice addition too
cons: Some of the errors flagged aren't true. 'Large number of pages pointing to the same canonical URL for domain' for example

description: Even if Bing does not bring as many visits as Google, it has an important role in website traffic and optimizing the website for it is important. As I know Bing serves other search engines with the index of the websites.
author: Lee W.
pros: The account setup and adding a project is straightforward. Bing Webmaster has many useful feature for every website owner, my favorite is Index Now that allows you to get be sure your content is indexed as soon as is published. Site Explorer is another important feature, it allows me to check all websites pages to see i there are any problems.
cons: Support is there for you after weeks or even months since you open a ticket without any resolve.

author: Aakash P.
pros: Very easy to understand and navigate. It also has a good amount of metrics available for your personal projects and website.
cons: There are some false issues being raised but this seems to also be the case with competitors
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Bing Webmaster Tool: Comprehensive Site Analysis and Optimization
description: Overall, the Bing Webmaster Tool offers a variety of features that can help website owners improve their search engine visibility and increase traffic to their site. The tool provides a comprehensive analysis of a website, including optimization suggestions, which can be beneficial for website owners looking to improve their website's performance. However, it also has some limitations such as limited functionality compared to other tools and the navigation could be confusing for those who are not familiar with it. It is important to evaluate whether the tool's features align with the specific needs of your website before utilizing it as part of your optimization strategy.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Comprehensive analysis of the websiteEasy optimization suggestionsImproved search engine visibilityIncreased traffic to the website.
cons: Limited functionality compared to other toolsCan be difficult to navigate for beginners

description: Even if Bing have a smaller market share is not is not to neglect. Optimizing the website for Bing can bring you many clients. Bing Webmaster does a great job for optimization.
author: Andrei B.
pros: First time I thought nobody uses Bing but after adding the website I was really surprised. The feature i used the most is Keyword Research, it helps find the best keywords for you page an the top competitors. IndexNow is another great feature I really like, it really helps to keep index status of the newly published pages and articles.
cons: If a page is not indexed and doesn`t want to index it they will say is because Bing Webmaster Guidelines even the page compliance with it. No details given or how to resolve.

description: Is a nice platform, easy to navigate and understand.
author: Liam K.
pros: Some time ago i didn't care about Bing as a search engine and user source but after some research i changed my mind. Bing Webmaster shows important data about your website and gives good optimization tips not just for Bing. Site explorer show important tips on all websites pages and IndexNow feature allows you to index newly created pages instantly. Top Insights is another worth to mention feature because can signal you the pages that has problems with headings, tags and ALTs missing from certain pages, all these optimization are important for all search engines, not just Bing.
cons: No cons at all, is a free tools that help optimizing your websites for all search engines.

author: Seyi O.
pros: Being able to disavow links is why I go to Bing Webmaster. I also like its speed of crawling new pages or website.
cons: The user interface is not so user-friendly and can be a bit confusing. I also prefer Google's overall reporting.

review_title: My 4 year experience with Bing webmaster tool
author: Ankit J.
pros: *Site gets indexed very fast, last time I submitted a sitemap my site got indexed within 12,14 hours. *Easy to submit a sitemap
cons: When we change the theme of the site sometimes the site gets deindexed.

review_title: Bing Webmaster pour une fluidité dans la recherche
author: Essoyomèwè A.
pros: Toutes les fonctionnalités de Bing webmaster sont intéressantes
cons: Je n'ai trouvé aucun inconvénient lors de l'usage du logiciel

description: Loved, loved and loved. Still loving and the love keeps growing.
author: Martha N.
pros: Bing is an excellent tool. I hope to use it a lot more going forward, 2024 is it.
cons: Nothing. Bing is so good that I have no negative thing about them.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Henrique C.
pros: Software que oferece várias ferramentas entre elas a gestão das pass-word e motor de busca.
cons: Mais um software a lutar contra o Google e vais ter uma luta muito difícil pela frente.

review_title: It is the Best Alternative to Google Search Console
description: We use it mainly for the purpose of getting alternative source of traffic from Microsoft bing search, and it has been doing the job well.
author: Ade A.
pros: It is very easy to use, and understand. Although, it doesn't have much features like Google search console but it definitely has all you need to get some rankings and traffic from Microsoft Bing search. It has a tool to help check if your pages are mobile friendly and I love the instant submission API which can be easily connected to any SEO plugin to facilitate instant indexing.
cons: One of my sites stopped getting traffic from bing many months ago, and to my greatest surprise, all their helpful articles to fix the problem was not helpful at all and all efforts to reach out to support was futile.

review_title: L'outil de referencement pour les webmasters sur le moteur de recherche de Microsoft.
author: Frederic M.
pros: L'interface qui se situe dans le Cloud de Microsoft bing.
cons: Peut de visiteurs si l'on utilise pas la publicité venant de Bing (Affliation).

description: It was a great and enjoyable experience, especially when using artificial intelligence bing.ai and I advise you to try it As fast as possible
author: Hasan A.
pros: The most positive thing is the presence of artificial intelligence to help, which performs the tasks given to it better than other artificial intelligence sites
cons: The control panel needs some improvements to make the program easier to use
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Fabio R.
pros: Oggi di questa app è trovare tutte le notizie per avere la per avere le notizie giornaliere
cons: Niente giornalmente ti danno questi punti per avere un delle Gift Card

review_title: Good product but can be better
author: advik G.
pros: Very easy to learn and there is no lag at all.
cons: I made a few mistakes in my search inteannily but it sometime doesn't detect

review_title: Bing Web Master Tools will make you better at SEO
description: I admit, I don't use Bing Web Mater Tools enough. There is a lot of good information here and many other tools charge for this. Google tends to hide backlink data. The fact is Bing is a huge search engine so the information here is reliable and valuable. Use it.
author: Don R.
pros: The backlinks report is a hidden gem in Bing WMT. Most importantly it is free! But beyond that you will get a huge list of all the banklinks on your site and can compare it to another website to see what you are missing. The tool shares anchor text and in one click you can get to that page to see if you can earn a link.
cons: I would not mind seeing a content gap report that shows what my competitors have that I do not. But no real complaints with Bing WMT.

author: Elisa M.
pros: Bing Webmaster tools is really easy to set up and the UX is excellent. Bing Webmaster tools provide a clear snapshot of my performance and provide excellent insights to improve my overall SEO
cons: I have no complaints about Bing Webmaster tools at all

review_title: Seamless and well put together experience. Would recommend.
description: I would most deffinately recommend this to anyone from veterans to those just starting out using webmaster tools.
author: Josh H.
pros: The ease of use and convenience of being able to view SEO info like traffic, adding to the Bing web crawler, and best of all is the traffic analytics. It's been a good experience with Bing webmaster I have no complaints.
cons: Nothing, it works as it should and gives more analytics than I could have hoped.

review_title: Great even with low Bing traffic.
description: Great tool to give a rounded view of your search and can give insights outside of what google offers.
author: Ryan M.
pros: It's a great resource for SEO on the technical side, even if you have low traffic on the Bing search. The technical aspects are also relevant on Google.
cons: Much lower search volume than google, so if you have low traffic the results for search performance are less useful.

author: Tanirah C.
pros: This product is easy to use you can navigate through the webpage your looking for
cons: It sometimes crashes when your on sites with spam and viruses

author: Naquentt I.
pros: The fact that it can basically locate every information for you
cons: It is very technical and difficult to use
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Marie L.
pros: What I loved most was the search option because every time I search it gives me points because I'm linked with Microsoft rewards.
cons: What I disliked about Bing well is that it does this when I'm on a not secure website where it deletes content to save up memory then I have to reload the page repeatedly to stop it from deleting the conent.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
